Alterac Pass: Capture the enemy Prison Camp to summon your Cavalry. Camps can be retaken by Heroes and Minions, so guard them well!
Cavalry soldiers charge down each lane when summoned granting increased damage and movement speed to nearby Allied Heroes.
Each team’s Core has been replaced by a General who fights against attacking enemies. Destroying a Keep reduces the General’s Armor.
Battlefield of Eternity: The angel lieutenant Ilarian and the demon lord Beleth are locked in an endless war.
Aid your Immortal ally against his foe to claim victory.
Rally to your Immortal as he wreaks havoc on the enemy's Structures!
Blackheart's Bay: Attack Treasure Chests and Mercenaries to collect Doubloons.
Hand your Doubloons over to Blackheart or you will drop them all when you die!
After receiving enough Doubloons from your team, Blackheart will bombard your enemy's Structures!
Blackheart's Revenge: Prevent enemy Heroes from collecting Cannonballs and firing the Cannons at Blackheart’s Ship.
Defend the Ship until it destroys the enemy Core at the docks to win.
Braxis Holdout: Periodically two Beacons will activate. Capture both to fill your Holding Cell with Zerg.
Once either Holding Cell fills, both open and unleash waves of Zerg at each team's base.
Hold out against the enemy's Zerg while helping yours. They will attack Heroes, so engage cautiously.
Braxis Outpost: Heroes do not heal in the starting area. Hearthstones have been disabled.
Regeneration Globes spawn across the battleground. Gather them to heal.
No additional objectives are present on the battleground. Destroy your enemy's Core and win.
Checkpoint: Hanamura: There are no Cores in this Brawl. The match ends when the Payload reaches the end or the timer runs out.
A Payload will only spawn for your team. Stand next to it to move it to the end before the timer runs out.
Cursed Hollow: The Raven Lord will create Tributes periodically. Gather them for your team!
Upon capturing three Tributes, the Raven Lord will curse your enemies!
Cursed Structures will not attack, and cursed Minions are reduced to 1 Health.
Dragon Shire: There are two Shrines your team needs to control to activate the Dragon Knight's statue!
While activated, bring a Hero to the statue to free him from his prison!
Use the Dragon's immense power to level enemy Structures!
Garden Arena: Kill garden monsters to collect Seeds!
Garden of Terror: Queen Nightshade will periodically summon a Seed. Defeat its Shambler Defenders and gather it for your team!
Upon gathering three Seeds, Garden Terrors will immediately burrow to each lane.
Garden Terrors disable enemy Structures, so fight alongside them!
Garden of Terror Classic: At night, Shamblers will rise from the Gardens.
Kill the Shamblers and collect Seeds for your team!
With 100 Seeds, control your Garden Terror and destroy your enemy!
Hanamura Temple: At regular intervals, a Payload spawns at the center of the battleground that can be contested by both teams.
Stand next to the Payload and move it to its destination. Prevent the enemy from trying to do the same.
Once a team escorts the Payload to its destination, it will fire upon the enemy's Structures!
Haunted Mines: The Haunted Mines will periodically open with an Undead Army underneath!
Destroy the Undead and collect their Skulls to power your Golems!
After a team has collected 55 Skulls, the Golems will arise for both teams! The more Skulls your team collects, the stronger your Golem!
Industrial District: Heroes do not heal in the starting area. Hearthstones have been disabled.
Regeneration Globes spawn across the battleground. Gather them to heal.
No additional objectives are present on the battleground. Destroy your enemy's Core and win.
Infernal Shrines: The Infernal Shrines periodically gather power. Activate them and prepare for a fight.
Slay 40 Guardians before the enemy team to bring forth a mighty Punisher.
Punishers have one of three devastating powers. Be careful, they focus on attacking Heroes above all else.
Lost Cavern: Heroes do not heal in the starting area. Hearthstones have been disabled.
Regeneration Globes spawn across the battleground. Gather them to heal.
No additional objectives are present on the battleground. Destroy your enemy's Core and win.
Lunar Rocket Racing: Heroes automatically move toward their mouse cursor's location!
Pick up envelopes to gain access to different Abilities!
Complete 7 laps and win! The last player loses the race.
Punisher Arena: Punishers alternate between attacking each other and Heroes. Each round the Punisher's magic Abilities will change.
Enemy Heroes are worth 4 points. The enemy's Punisher is worth 10.
Sandbox (Cursed Hollow): The Raven Lord will create Tributes periodically. Gather them for your team!
Upon capturing three Tributes, the Raven Lord will curse your enemies!
Cursed Structures will not attack, and cursed Minions are reduced to 1 Health.
Sandbox (Volskaya Foundry): Control points activate occasionally. Stand within them to capture them. Fully capturing a point grants you control of a giant mech.
The Triglav Protector mech is controlled by two players: one pilot and one gunner. Work together!
The Protector's Abilities deal incredible damage to Structures and Heroes alike. Use it to lay waste to your enemy.
Silver City: Heroes do not heal in the starting area. Hearthstones have been disabled.
Regeneration Globes spawn across the battleground. Gather them to heal.
No additional objectives are present on the battleground. Destroy your enemy's Core and win.
Sky Temple: Temples will periodically activate. Stand within their grounds to capture their power!
Stand firm and the Temple will unleash a blistering onslaught on your enemy's Structures!
Guardians will try to wrest control of their Temples from your team. Hold them off to keep the Temple's power for yourselves!
Snow Brawl: Snowballs spawn near Heroes, Buildings, Tributes, and Regen Globes. Pick them up and throw them!
Snowy Tributes spawn rapidly. Collect them to launch collossal snowballs at enemy Structures!
Incomplete Snowmen periodically form throughout the battleground. Use snowballs to complete them, and they will join your fight!
Temple Arena: Each round, a different number of Temples can activate throughout the fight.
Capture the Temples to destroy your enemy's core.
Tomb of the Spider Queen: Enemy spider Minions and Heroes drop magical Gems upon death. Gather as many as you can.
Relinquish your Gems at one of the Spider Queen's Altars or you will drop them all when you die!
Whichever team turns in enough Gems first will unleash the Webweavers to destroy their enemy's defenses.
Towers of Doom: Both Cores are protected by a barrier that cannot be attacked by Heroes. To be victorious, you must activate Altars.
Periodically Altars will rise across the battlefield. Activate them to have your Bell Towers fire upon the enemy's Core.
Destroy your enemy's Towers to bring them under your team's control. The more Towers you have, the more damage an altar will do.
Trial Grounds: Eliminate the enemy team to win the round.
Shortly after the start of the round, an objective appears at the center of the battleground. Use its power to destroy your enemies!
Health packs placed around the battleground restore a large portion of health and resources when picked up.
Volskaya Foundry: Control points activate occasionally. Stand within them to capture them. Fully capturing a point grants you control of a giant mech.
The Triglav Protector mech is controlled by two players: one pilot and one gunner. Work together!
The Protector's Abilities deal incredible damage to Structures and Heroes alike. Use it to lay waste to your enemy.
Warhead Junction: Periodically multiple Warheads will spawn across the battleground.
Collect a Warhead to activate your Nuke. Use it quick or you will drop it when you die!
Launch Nukes to burn enemy team's fortifications.  Attack their structures to extend the burn!
